close_reason: Updated to use fixed timestamps with :now parameter
description:
## File
`apps/bedrock_job_queue/test/bedrock/job_queue/store_test.exs`

## Tests to Update

### 1. "fresh queue lease is not expired" (lines 177-181)
```elixir
# Current
lease = QueueLease.new("tenant_1", "holder", 5000)
refute QueueLease.expired?(lease)
assert QueueLease.remaining_ms(lease) > 0

# Should be
now = 10_000
lease = QueueLease.new("tenant_1", "holder", duration_ms: 5000, now: now)
refute QueueLease.expired?(lease, now)
assert QueueLease.remaining_ms(lease, now) == 5000
```

### 2. "expired queue lease reports expired" (lines 184-188)
```elixir
# Current (uses struct manipulation)
lease = %{QueueLease.new("tenant_1", "holder", 5000) | expires_at: System.system_time(:millisecond) - 1000}
assert QueueLease.expired?(lease)
assert QueueLease.remaining_ms(lease) == 0

# Should be
now = 10_000
lease = QueueLease.new("tenant_1", "holder", duration_ms: 5000, now: 4_000)
assert QueueLease.expired?(lease, now)
assert QueueLease.remaining_ms(lease, now) == 0
```

## Principle
Eliminate struct manipulation - use :now injection throughout.
title: Update store_test.exs QueueLease expiration tests
